map_bindings.AlbedoAtlas: BaseColor candidate Texture2D atlas sampled by M_RaftSim_AtlasSampleReview through AtlasTileOriginScale and AtlasBlendWeight.
map_bindings.NormalAtlas: Normal candidate Texture2D atlas sampled by M_RaftSim_AtlasSampleReview and blended by NormalIntensity.
map_bindings.AORoughnessHeightAtlas: Packed R=AO, G=roughness, B=height candidate Texture2D atlas sampled by M_RaftSim_AtlasSampleReview into ambient occlusion, roughness, and preview pixel-depth offset.
map_bindings.PreviewColor: Fallback surface color used by M_RaftSim_AtlasSampleReview when assigned static proxy meshes do not have authored vertex colors.
map_bindings.VertexColorWeight: Review scalar that controls how strongly saved preview-map proxy vertex colors override PreviewColor before atlas blending.
map_bindings.RoughnessFloor: Review scalar that keeps atlas-assigned proxy surfaces from becoming overly reflective in preview captures.
map_bindings.SourceConditionedMacroAlbedo: Corridor-scale source-conditioned macro albedo Texture2D sampled through material-zone and conservative blend weights.
map_bindings.SourceConditionedMaterialZones: RGB source-conditioned material-zone mask: R=terrain/wet bank, G=vegetation, B=visible water.
map_bindings.SourceConditionedAORoughnessHeight: Packed source-conditioned R=AO proxy, G=roughness, B=height map for conservative review material response.
map_bindings.SourceConditionedZoneWeights: Per-material RGB zone weights selecting terrain/wet bank, vegetation, or water channels from SourceConditionedMaterialZones.
map_bindings.SourceConditionedMacroAlbedoWeight: Conservative source macro-albedo blend scalar gated by SourceConditionedZoneWeights and material-zone mask.
map_bindings.SourceConditionedSurfaceResponseWeight: Conservative source AO/roughness/height response blend scalar gated by SourceConditionedZoneWeights and material-zone mask.

output_wiring.BaseColor: lerp(lerp(lerp(PreviewColor, vertex_color, VertexColorWeight), AlbedoAtlas(atlas_uv), AtlasBlendWeight), SourceConditionedMacroAlbedo(corridor_uv), SourceConditionedMacroAlbedoWeight * material_zone_mask)
output_wiring.PixelDepthOffset: lerp(AORoughnessHeightAtlas.blue * HeightScale, SourceConditionedAORoughnessHeight.blue * HeightScale, SourceConditionedSurfaceResponseWeight * material_zone_mask)

promotion_gate: Review material-instance assets, bound Texture2D atlas assets, the atlas sampler parent material, and saved-map review scene assignments are created, but production promotion still requires capture comparison, guide/geospatial review, hazard readability, desktop/VR performance evidence, and final material approval.
current_decision: Use these reviewed Unreal Material Instance Constant assets as the canonical handoff from first-party atlas Texture2D assets to shader and scene-assignment work. The editor automation creates the nine atlas Texture2D review assets, creates the M_RaftSim_AtlasSampleReview parent material with albedo, normal, AO, roughness, and height sampler wiring, parents all 18 MI_RaftSim_*_AtlasCandidate assets to it, and assigns durable terrain, water, boulder, foliage, and raft preview-map surface proxies to the review MICs. They remain review-only until capture comparison, production material promotion, guide/geospatial review, hazard readability, and performance gates pass. Source-conditioned macro albedo, material-zone, and packed AO/roughness/height maps are now declared as review-only Texture2D inputs and bound to the atlas sampler review material instances with conservative zone weights; regenerated captures and human review are still required before any lifelike or production-material claim.
